component.name: PerseoChat
component.summary: Unified messaging + AI hub for Linux

description.p: PerseoChat gathers Slack, Microsoft Teams, Discord, WhatsApp, Telegram and the AI assistants you use — Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini, Grok, Perplexity, Copilot — into one native app.

Each service and account runs in its own isolated session, so you can keep several accounts of the same app side by side. Bundle accounts into persistent workspaces that each open as their own pinnable window.
First release: Linux x86_64 and aarch64, native.
